data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures user data and communications are encrypted to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Uses advanced encryption standards (AES-256) for data at rest and in transit.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: System to manage user identities and access to resources securely.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates OAuth for authentication and access delegation.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: Comprehensive strategy for handling security breaches and incidents.
data.technical_spec: Contains predefined protocols and a dedicated team for incident management.

data.title: Security Audits
data.description: Regular security audits to identify vulnerabilities and ensure compliance.
data.technical_spec: Continuous monitoring and penetration testing conducted by third-party specialists.

data.title: Firewall and Intrusion Detection
data.description: System defenses to detect and block unauthorized access attempts.
data.technical_spec: Advanced firewalls and intrusion detection systems in place.
